# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
## What's Changed in helm@0.2.0<!-- RELEASE NOTES START -->

### ⛰️  Features

* Support global pod labels, node selectors, and toleration, and service accounts by [@Tomusm](https://github.com/Tomusm) in [#10341](https://github.com/tuist/tuist/pull/10341)
